test_cases.title: Happy Path - Successful Scenario
test_cases.description: Verify the main functionality described in the user story works as expected
steps: Execute the main action described in the user story
Check that no errors are displayed
test_cases.expected_result: The functionality works as described in the user story without errors

test_cases.title: Input Validation Test
test_cases.description: Verify that input validation works correctly
steps: Attempt to submit with invalid data
test_cases.expected_result: System displays appropriate validation messages and prevents invalid submissions

test_cases.title: Edge Case - Boundary Values
test_cases.description: Test the system behavior with boundary values
preconditions: Test data with boundary values is prepared
steps: Identify minimum and maximum acceptable values
Test with values just outside boundaries
test_cases.expected_result: System handles boundary values correctly and rejects invalid values

test_cases.title: Error Handling Test
test_cases.description: Verify proper error handling and user feedback
test_cases.expected_result: System displays user-friendly error messages and handles errors gracefully

test_cases.title: User Experience Test
test_cases.description: Verify the user experience meets requirements
test_cases.expected_result: User interface is intuitive and provides a good user experience
